- **ITEM 4:** No results returned. Pickhardt & Summers are real CT body composition researchers at well-known institutions; a 2020 Radiology paper on opportunistic CT fracture prediction is plausible based on my knowledge.
- **ITEM 5:** URL provided points to ScienceDirect; a LiDAR-based OpenSim scaling paper in Journal of Biomechanics is plausible.
